**Bug 1 - Drawer Closes on Country Code Dropdown Click:**
- No data-country-dropdown attribute check in click-outside handler
- No data-country-dropdown attribute on CountryCodeDropdown wrapper
- Counterexample: The drawer's click-outside handler doesn't exclude country dropdown clicks

**Bug 2 - Modal Closes on Invalid Email Submission:**
- onCloseAutoFocus={handleClose} exists in DialogContent (calls handleClose unconditionally)
- Counterexample: The onCloseAutoFocus handler closes the modal even when validation fails

**Bug 3 - Modal Closes on Missing Role Submission:**
- Related to Bug 2 - validation works but modal closes due to onCloseAutoFocus
- Counterexample: Modal closes despite proper role validation

**Bug 4 - Missing Disabled Button Tooltip:**
- No Tooltip import from @sparrowengg/twigs-react
- No tooltip with "Fill out the required fields" message
- Counterexample: Disabled button provides no feedback to users

**Bug 5 - Unnecessary useCallback Functions:**
- applyPhoneStateFromUser is wrapped in useCallback (unnecessary)
- handleFieldName is wrapped in useCallback (unnecessary)
- Counterexample: Functions wrapped in useCallback without performance benefits

Test Results: 8 failed (as expected), 3 passed
- The failures confirm all 5 bugs exist in the unfixed code
- Tests encode the expected behavior and will pass after fixes are implemented
